summary: The diff addresses all 5 requirements. REQ-1 is handled in Dashboard.tsx (activeTab state + tabValueToSummaryKey passed to SummaryCards) and SummaryCards.tsx (ghost-row filtering per tab). REQ-2 is described in file summaries for SummaryCards.tsx and ReadyTab.tsx. REQ-3, REQ-4, and REQ-5 are implemented in TotalOrdersTab.tsx (oldest-first sort, bold orange design code, image icon removed). However, the diff is truncated for TotalOrdersTab.tsx so REQ-4 and REQ-5 cannot be fully confirmed from code, only from the file summary. REQ-2's ReadyTab.tsx change is only referenced in the summary file, not shown in the actual diff. Confidence is moderate due to truncation.
